series_metadata.series_title: Reports and Inquiries by Data Classification and Adhoc reports
series_metadata.series_description: Various computer generated reports distributed from the Ohio Administrative Knowledge System. AdHoc reports include: appropriation, trial balance, vendor, grant, capital project, revenue, spending, cash dispersement, agency cash balance, payroll, transaction processing.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of the State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of the State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
